products.name: Black Mask Skin Care
products.description: Black mask dry skin remover is a peel-off facial treatment designed to unclog pores, remove dead skin cells, and absorb excess oil. It leaves the skin feeling smoother, clearer, and more refreshed after each use.

products.name: Cocoa Butter Cream
products.description: Cocoa butter cream is a rich, moisturizing skincare product made from natural cocoa bean fat, known for its deep hydration and skin-soothing properties. It helps improve skin elasticity, reduce dryness, and leave the skin feeling soft and nourished.

products.name: Aloe Vera Lotion
products.description: Aloe vera lotion is a soothing, hydrating moisturizer enriched with aloe extract to calm irritated or sun-exposed skin. It absorbs quickly, leaving the skin feeling cool, refreshed, and smooth.

products.name: Lip Balm
products.description: Lip balm is a moisturizing treatment designed to soothe and protect dry, chapped lips. It forms a nourishing barrier to lock in hydration and keep lips soft and smooth.

products.name: Duo Mink Hair Eyebrows
products.description: Duo Mink Hair Fake Eyebrows are realistic, reusable brow enhancements made from soft mink hair to mimic natural eyebrow texture. They offer a quick and easy way to achieve fuller, well-defined brows without permanent makeup.

products.name: Perfume Refill
products.description: Perfume refills are eco-friendly, cost-effective alternatives that allow you to replenish your favorite fragrance without buying a new bottle. They help reduce waste while ensuring you always have your signature scent on hand.

products.name: Stickons
products.description: Nail stickons are pre-designed adhesive nail coverings that offer a quick and easy way to achieve salon-style manicures at home. They come in various colors, patterns, and finishes, sticking directly to the nails without the need for polish or drying time.

products.name: Asante Soaps
products.description: Asante Soaps are handcrafted, natural soaps made with nourishing ingredients like shea butter, essential oils, and herbal extracts. They gently cleanse the skin while promoting hydration, leaving it soft, refreshed, and delicately scented.

products.name: Brass Rings
products.description: Brass rings are durable and stylish accessories made from a copper-zinc alloy, known for their warm golden hue and vintage appeal. They are often used in jewelry, crafts, or hardware, offering both aesthetic charm and long-lasting strength.

products.name: Laundry Basket
products.description: Reed Laundry Basket is a stylish and functional storage solution made from natural reed materials, offering durability and a rustic charm. Ideal for organizing laundry, it combines breathable design with aesthetic appeal, perfect for home decor and practical use.

products.name: Vaseline Body Oil
products.description: Vaseline Body Oil is a lightweight, fast-absorbing moisturizer that deeply nourishes and hydrates the skin. Infused with healing ingredients like pure Vaseline jelly or cocoa butter, it leaves the skin soft, smooth, and glowing without a greasy feel.

products.name: Body Mist
products.description: Body mist is a light, refreshing fragrance spray designed for all-over body use, offering a subtle scent that lingers without being overpowering. It often contains moisturizing ingredients to hydrate the skin while providing a gentle burst of aroma.

products.name: Moroccan Oil
products.description: Moroccan oil is a nutrient-rich hair treatment infused with argan oil, known for its ability to deeply hydrate, smooth, and add shine to all hair types. It helps reduce frizz, improve manageability, and protect against heat and environmental damage.

products.name: Luodais Professional Salon
products.description: Luodais Professional Salon is a premium haircare brand known for salon-quality styling products and treatments. It offers solutions like hair serums, sprays, and oils designed to nourish, protect, and enhance hair's natural shine and manageability.

products.name: Dr Rashel Face Cream
products.description: Dr Rashel Face Cream is a nourishing skincare product designed to hydrate, brighten, and even out the skin tone. Infused with natural ingredients like vitamins and plant extracts, it helps reduce signs of aging, fade dark spots, and improve overall skin texture for a radiant glow.

products.name: Skin Products
products.description: We have affordable skin products like collagen and Mary Kay to replenish your natural skin beauty.

products.name: Hair Combs
products.description: New combs designed to give your hair a beautiful look in no time

products.name: Medicated Fade Cream with Sunscreen
products.description: This fade creme is best for you to keep your skin even-toned for a smooth complexion.

handbags.name: Red Handbag
handbags.description: This handbag features a bold red design, making a striking statement with its vibrant color. Its sleek and durable construction ensures both style and practicality, perfect for adding a pop of elegance to any outfit.

handbags.name: Leopard Spots & Leather
handbags.description: This handbag exudes bold elegance with its premium leather construction and striking leopard print accents. Perfect for adding a touch of wild sophistication to any outfit, it combines durability with a stylish edge, making it a versatile statement piece for any occasion.

handbags.name: Leather Handbag
handbags.description: This handbag features a sleek, modern design with a classic black leather finish and subtle square patterns for a refined touch. Its structured shape and durable material make it a versatile accessory that effortlessly complements both casual and formal outfits.

handbags.name: Brown leather and Cheetah Spots
handbags.description: This handbag showcases a bold yet sophisticated design, featuring rich brown leather paired with striking cheetah spots. Its textured finish adds a dynamic touch, making it a versatile statement piece that blends elegance with a wild edge.

handbags.name: Kiondo
handbags.description: This kiondo bag features a beautiful blend of brown and tan tones, woven from durable sisal with a classic Kenyan design. Its structured shape and earthy colors make it a stylish and practical accessory for both casual and formal occasions.

handbags.name: Brown and Grey Leather Handbag
handbags.description: This handbag features a sophisticated blend of brown and grey leather, offering a timeless and versatile design. Its durable construction and neutral tones make it a stylish accessory for both casual and formal occasions.

handbags.name: Grey Handbag
handbags.description: This handbag features a sleek grey leather design, offering a modern and versatile look. Its durable construction and understated elegance make it a perfect accessory for both casual and formal occasions.

services.name: Hair Cuts

general_info.business_description: Kenrish Collection is a premium beauty and lifestyle destination in Nakuru City, offering professional barbershop, hairdressing, and beauty services alongside a curated collection of beauty products and stylish handbags.
general_info.contact_info: Visit us in Nakuru City or browse our online collection
